title: Day 19: Day 19 — Retention Strategies
content:
# Day 19 — Retention Strategies

## Topic
Keeping agents after you recruit them

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Most agents leave for the same reasons:** Lack of leads, lack of support, and poor economics usually matter more than branding alone.
- **Retention starts before problems show up:** Regular check-ins let you catch frustration early instead of reacting after they’ve mentally checked out.
- **Coaching beats neglect:** Performance coaching, accountability, and practical business support make agents feel invested in.
- **Support must be visible:** It’s not enough to offer help—you need to make sure agents actually experience it consistently.
- **Measure retention drivers:** Track who is thriving, who is disengaging, and what support patterns correlate with stickiness.

## Why It Matters
Recruiting a new agent is expensive in time and energy. Strong retention protects that investment, improves brokerage stability, and compounds growth because you’re not constantly replacing people who should have stayed.
